narrative:
Catawba Island 4 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 832 registered voters, with 44.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
